title: piratescraft
description: Sail the high seas, plunder enemy ships, and amass a fortune in stolen treasure.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1517b9cd08a92348d3902dd1b3124dee0ab9c5e2.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![discontinued](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6223af97622f53d1dc67e91bb40f7fcf52c974e3.png)
Forget the mundane grind of mining and farming! In this modpack, survival hinges on your ability to loot pillage and steal. Sail the high seas, board enemy ships, and plunder their valuable cargo.

FEATURES:

Loot, Plunder, and Profit: There are hundreds of new and improved structures to explore and loot and with that the addition of many new items and weapons to find and obtain.
Build a Fearsome Fleet: build your own unique ships using the eureaka mod allowing you to build the ship of your dreams (this also includes airships!)
Strategic Combat: This modpack overhauls the combat experience with rolls smash attacks and more aswell as adding powerful enchants and modifiers to gear
Multiplayer: Easily connect with freinds with the essentials mod as thats what this modpack was made for!

Pirates Craft is a world of danger and opportunity where the strongest survive and the most cunning thrive. Are you ready to embrace the pirate's life?
